Join the Protocol

We are a decentralized collective of paranoid engineers building bulletproof sovereign vaults.

Why Work With Us?

We don't care about your real name, your degree, or your location. We pay entirely in USDC/USDT stablecoins or ETH. We judge wholly on GitHub commits, mathematical prowess, and security mindset. If you can break our code or build it better, we want you.

Open Roles

Senior Smart Contract Auditor

Security • Remote / Pseudonymous

Deep expertise in EVM assembly, formal verification, and exploit mitigation. You will be responsible for attacking the Digital Will Protocol internally before updates hit mainnet.

Apply Now

Applied Cryptography Lead

Engineering • Remote / Pseudonymous

Architecting the transition from pure AES-256 SSS to fully-integrated Multi-Party Computation (MPC) wallets and Zero Knowledge proof validation systems.

Apply Now

Full-Stack Web3 Engineer

Engineering • Remote / Pseudonymous

Building the Next.js / React Native bridges that interact with our Web3.Storage IPFS pipelines and Polygon JSON-RPC nodes.

Apply Now

Securing digital legacies for the decentralized future. Your assets, your rules.
